message:
fix: add bedrock support to doctor command health checks

The doctor command only special-cased ollama for implicit auth
(available without API key env vars). Bedrock users with IAM role
auth would get false "no API keys configured" failures.

- Add bedrock to implicit-auth check in both computeDoctorChecks and
  selfTest sections
- Add bedrock-specific self-test branch showing region info
- Update "no API keys" message to mention AWS credentials

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
